mapper.sql: id, dict_code, dict_name, description, status, TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createTime
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_dict_info WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0

SELECT FROM sys_dict_info WHERE delete_flag = 0
AND dict_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dictCode}, '%')
AND dict_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dictName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY dict_code ASC, create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_dict_info SET dict_code = #{dictCode}, dict_name = #{dictName}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
